programme.desc: Gail and Martin go to Paris. Steve tells Fiona that Alan is not good enough for her. Deirdre confesses to Liz that she is in love with Jon. Judy hears the gossip about Gary

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona upsets Alan's parents by insisting they will not move the wedding date. Chris feels excluded when Des and Angie get on so well. Ken brings Daniel home for a holiday

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kirsty and Lyn are desperate to move out of the Woolpack. Zoe pleads with the Windsors to take Kelly back home. Alan offers to lend Heather the deposit for a new place

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv rows with Donna about going back to school. Chris suggests to Kelly that she comes to live at Home Farm. Steve admits to Kim how much he hates working at the quarry

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Investigations into the identity of the victim of a car crash uncovers connections to violent criminals, and leads to worries about his intended business in Aidensfield. Not realising their true value, Peggy tries to offload some goats when she finds them too difficult to milk. Oscar takes on the surveillance of a woman whose husband suspects she is having an affair, leaving Dawn and Bernie in charge of the bar. Mark Moraghan and Adam Christopher guest star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid dodges a stage performance, only to end up sorting out props and scenery. Classic comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mrs Roper discovers a cheap holiday scheme that requires the couple to join the Conservative Party - but George is a staunch Labour supporter

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective is faced with a dilemma when a murder investigation leads him to the radar station where his missing son was working on a highly classified operation - just as Hitler launches a major offensive on Britain's RAF airfields. To solve the mystery, Foyle must penetrate the closed ranks of the airforce. Second World War crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, Julian Ovenden, Honeysuckle Weeks, Anthony Calf, Roger Allam and Anton Lesser

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Rachel's informant leads police to a drugs shipment at a deserted cove. The perpetrator's girlfriend, having struck up a friendship with Gina at antenatal classes, agrees to use her to help him escape - but a hostage crisis ensues, leaving the barmaid in great danger. Peggy comes up with alternative transport when Bernie worries his hearse won't be ready for a funeral. Tim Brooke-Taylor makes a guest appearance

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Alan confronts Kirsty about stealing food. Steve informs the police when the quarry robbery is in progress. Micky threatens revenge on Steve

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve gives his statement to the police about the quarry theft. Kim gets some mysterious phone calls and thinks it might be Micky Bell

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre is pleased when Jon invites her to his house. Kevin is furious with Sally for making a large withdrawal from their joint account. Ken struggles to cope with Daniel

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally begs Mike for a job on the machines. Deirdre is thrilled when Jon asks her to move in with him. Fiona is furious when she discovers that Alan hit Steve

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A petty thief is impaled with a pitchfork in sleepy Midsomer Mallow, jeopardising the residents' chances of winning a 'perfect village' competition. To make matters worse, two of the judges are also killed. Guest starring Timothy West and Hannah Gordon, along with an early appearance by a young Orlando Bloom as the first victim

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A well-known eccentric contacts the Belgian sleuth when he is haunted by suicidal nightmares. However, he fails to follow Poirot's advice, and is found dead soon afterwards. Drama, starring David Suchet, with Joely Richardson and Mary Tamm

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of a sheep farmer leads Wycliffe into the heart of a rural community whose apparently tranquil surface conceals a desperate struggle for survival. It is not long before he uncovers disturbing evidence suggesting foul play. Drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr Ellingham visits an elderly patient - but ends up having to contend with her irate son. To make matters worse, the man turns out to be one of Louisa's ex-boyfriends. However, trouble is not just confined to the doctor's daily routine as the villagers find themselves forced to deal with the threat of a mystery mugger. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes as the grumpy GP

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa is eager to be promoted to head teacher, but her chances are threatened by a spate of sickly children and a frosty relationship with the board of governors, including a surly Martin. Mrs Cronk scalds herself at the fish and chip shop and has to put Bert in charge. To everyone's amazement, the business does a roaring trade - but Al suspects his father is cutting corners

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The year is 1940, and Sam is made homeless when a bomb destroys her boarding house, alerting Foyle to a system of organised looting around Hastings. However, when a corpse is found on the beach, the investigation brings the team into conflict with British attempts to secure vital American aid for the war effort. Police drama, starring Michael Kitchen, with Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When a business magnate, his wife and their maid are murdered, Miss Marple (Julia McKenzie) is prompted by the circumstances surrounding the incidents to recall the nursery rhyme Sing a Song of Sixpence. She discovers the victims were part of a family tainted by secrets, and as she ponders the significance of the tune, a past scandal reveals itself. Murder mystery, featuring Wendy Richard as feisty cook Mrs Crump, in her final dramatic role. Other guest stars include Prunella Scales, Matthew Macfadyen, Ralf Little, Rupert Graves and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Harry and the Contessa agree to play along when Inspector Newman asks them to help protect a dead man. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: In the most dangerous assignment of his career, Holmes is asked to stop the marriage of Violet Merville to Baron Gruner - a wealthy collector of objets d'art and beautiful women, whom the sleuth knows to be a murderer. Victorian detective drama, guest starring Anthony Valentine with Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: In order to investigate a villain's idea of the perfect crime, Harriet poses as a prostitute and Jim goes up in the world. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter investigate when a fellow officer is coerced into acting as a getaway driver by the gangsters who have kidnapped his wife. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman, and featuring a guest appearance by Billy Murray

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed finds himself prime suspect when foreign agents are suddenly systematically killed off, so initiates a truce with his Russian opposite and together they work to discover the identity of the killers

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur employs a truck-load of ex-cons as cheap labour for his new landscape gardening business and things go swimmingly - until a series of thefts puts paid to the enterprise and he finds himself out of pocket. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The daughter of a prominent professor is terrified by a mysterious prowler who haunts the grounds of her home by night and seems able to scale sheer walls with ease. Guest starring Charles Kay, Sarah Woodward, Adrian Lukis and Alice Morphy

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The pair are caught between two rival gangs in a world of extortion, murder and kidnapping. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A routine surveillance assignment leads Regan and Carter to a massive car-parking fraud. Crackerjack veteran Peter Glaze features in the supporting cast, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel are called into action after a motorist reports having repeatedly run over and killed the same person. The duo's investigation lead them to a secret Neoteric Research Unit. Christopher Lee guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets an illegal car phone, while Terry dates the wealthy daughter of a hamburger king who suddenly goes bankrupt. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Patrick Malahide and Peter Capaldi alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An amnesiac woman delivers a garbled message about an attack on a diplomatic meeting planned for the following day. She later regains her memory and tells Bodie and Doyle her employers were abducted by the same gunmen who intend to carry out the action. Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Claire Richards from Steps, musician and presenter Rowland Rivron, England rugby union star James Haskell and Blue singer Antony Costa compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of their general knowledge. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: Cameras focus on life at Leeds Bradford airport during the summer of 2018. It may not be the UK's biggest, but what it lacks in size, it makes up for in ambition. With owners having green-lit a multi-million pound investment, the airport is undergoing a huge makeover. There are also problems for the staff due to an emergency landing after a plane's cockpit warning alarm shows its door is still open. Meanwhile, terminal manager Nathan has to deal with a blocked international arrivals door. Hugh Dennis narrates

programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: The airline auditors pay a surprise visit to Leeds Bradford airport, which leaves baggage boys Jimmy and Michael in fear for their jobs when they manage to lose a piece of luggage. Duty manager Nathan has to deal with a flood in the toilets next to an executive departure lounge, and new recruit Gabby faces a trial by fire at the Departure Gate. She has to tell the members of an irate family that they will not be sitting together on their flight to Palma, and struggles to control the ensuing confrontation

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever (1971)
programme.desc: James Bond investigates a diamond-smuggling operation, and discovers that behind the scheme is his insidious arch-enemy Blofeld, who is planning to construct a devastating orbital doomsday weapon powered by the precious stones, which will force world powers to disarm and give him global domination. Spy adventure, starring Sean Connery, Jill St John, Charles Gray, Bernard Lee and Lois Maxwell

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest entertainment news

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever (1971)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade continues his investigations into supposedly deadly freshwater creatures. From right across the Amazon there are stories of a colossal fish that is said to swallow men whole. Some call it the 'lau-lau', others the 'piraiba'. But after 20 years of criss-crossing South America, Jeremy has never seen a specimen big enough to convince him that the fishermen's tales are true. In this programme, he heads to a remote and little-known backwater of Guyana on a mission to finally track down this alleged monster

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Neil Spooner and Tom Dove travel to Thailand, where they have previously caught huge Siamese carp, but this time the focus is on the other species of carp found there. Their adventure is split between Fishing Park Samui and Gillhams Fishing Resorts, where they will have to use all of their skill and knowledge to outwit as many different carp species as possible, and in the process they will be hoping to bank one of the stunning Jullien's golden carp that can be found there

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage from Warwick, including the 3.00 Classic Chase. Plus, three races from Market Rasen. With analysis from Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, betting news with Matt Chapman, reports from Mick Fitzgerald, and commentary by Richard Hoiles

programme.title: The Towering Inferno (1974)
programme.desc: The world's tallest building goes up in flames during the opening celebrations. Disaster movie, starring Paul Newman, Steve McQueen, Faye Dunaway, William Holden, Fred Astaire, Richard Chamberlain, Susan Blakely and Robert Vaughn

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hapless fool sits an exam, but when he realises he has studied the wrong maths equations, it is already too late. He also tries to stifle a sneeze in church. Rowan Atkinson stars in the first episode of the celebrated comedy, with Richard Briers, Rudolph Walker and Howard Goodall

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The buffoon wreaks havoc when he goes shopping and dines at an exclusive restaurant - and there is an unfortunate incident when he meets a member of the royal family at a film premiere. Rowan Atkinson stars

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hero bumbles his way through a disaster-packed day that takes him from the swimming baths and lunch in the park on to a night at the cinema with his girlfriend. Rowan Atkinson stars, with Angus Deayton and Matilda Ziegler

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson leaves his brain at home once more to play the bungling buffoon of few words. He goes shopping for a new TV, has problems with an itchy foot and takes a lucky girl for a night on the town - leaving the usual trail of chaos in his wake

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A routine trip to the dentist ends disastrously for Bean, and a quiet stroll in the park gradually turns into a pitched battle with a wasp. Rowan Atkinson stars, with appearances by Richard Wilson and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's clumsy alter ego returns to cause more chaos as he puts his dubious first aid skills to good use on an unconscious man in the street, makes a meal out of the simple task of posting a letter, and jets off for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hapless hero plans the Christmas holiday of a lifetime - but fate intervenes and pulls the rug out from under his feet, reducing what should have been the perfect festive season to a frantic comedy of errors. Slapstick, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's comic alter ego embarks on another disaster-filled outing when he treats his hotel room to a makeover but ends up causing devastation

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The bumbling hero tries his level best to turn a babysitting job into a fun-packed day at the fair, but predictably makes a hash of it. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A New Year's party falls flat, but Bean finds an ingenious way to beat the sales crowds and bag a bargain before getting down to some seriously ham-fisted DIY decorating. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: An orientation day gives the hapless Mr Bean a chance to revisit his school days, and it is not long before he lives up to his disaster-prone reputation. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson slips into silly mode once more as his comic alter ego visits the launderette and somehow manages to lose his trousers, getting himself into a real pickle as he tries to retrieve them. Fully dressed again, he moves on to the crazy golf course, where the relatively simple task of hitting the ball leads to utter chaos

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite idiot visits hospital to cure a nasty little problem, but proves to be a somewhat impatient outpatient, and later has trouble sleeping. Starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The blunderingly inept master of disaster goes for a haircut, but ends up styling the other customers' hair. Later, he causes chaos at a school fun day. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Happy Birthday Mr Bean
programme.desc: How the sitcom character - who featured in just 14 original episodes - has gone on to become a global superstar with an animated series and two top-grossing feature films. Rowan Atkinson's alter-ego has become an online phenomenon, with more than 110 million online fans and growing. This documentary features classic clips and interviews with Richard Curtis, Tony Robinson and Angus Deayton

programme.title: Airplane! (1980)
programme.desc: The passengers on board an ill-fated airliner become increasingly jittery when the flight crew flounder during a food-poisoning crisis. As ground control personnel struggle heroically to ensure the plane lands safely, a traumatised war veteran must face his fear to take the controls. Spoof disaster movie, starring Robert Hays, Leslie Nielsen, Robert Stack and Lloyd Bridges

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers
programme.desc: Biologist, extreme angler and naturalist Jeremy Wade heads to the Amazon. Together with its tributaries, it contains an incredible 20 per cent of Earth's fresh water, and the immense forests it sustains generate a quarter of the oxygen needed for life on the planet. Disgorging more water than the next nine biggest rivers combined, this waterway is indeed a mighty affair. By tracing the epic migration of the dorado catfish, Jeremy discovers the issues putting this great river at risk - from leaking pipelines to giant dams. However, he also discovers tales of surprising hope

programme.desc: The Contessa is held captive by a deranged killer who puts her 'on trial' in a bizarre act of vengeance. Drama, starring Nyree Dawn Porter

programme.desc: Regan and Carter investigate when a fellow officer is coerced into acting as a getaway driver by the gangsters who have kidnapped his wife. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman, and featuring a guest appearance by Billy Murray

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed finds himself prime suspect when foreign agents are suddenly systematically killed off, so initiates a truce with his Russian opposite and together they work to discover the identity of the killers

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The daughter of a prominent professor is terrified by a mysterious prowler who haunts the grounds of her home by night and seems able to scale sheer walls with ease. Guest starring Charles Kay, Sarah Woodward, Adrian Lukis and Alice Morphy

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The pair are caught between two rival gangs in a world of extortion, murder and kidnapping. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A routine surveillance assignment leads Regan and Carter to a massive car-parking fraud. Crackerjack veteran Peter Glaze features in the supporting cast, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel are called into action after a motorist reports having repeatedly run over and killed the same person. The duo's investigation lead them to a secret Neoteric Research Unit. Christopher Lee guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets an illegal car phone, while Terry dates the wealthy daughter of a hamburger king who suddenly goes bankrupt. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Patrick Malahide and Peter Capaldi alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An amnesiac woman delivers a garbled message about an attack on a diplomatic meeting planned for the following day. She later regains her memory and tells Bodie and Doyle her employers were abducted by the same gunmen who intend to carry out the action. Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Claire Richards from Steps, musician and presenter Rowland Rivron, England rugby union star James Haskell and Blue singer Antony Costa compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of their general knowledge. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: Cameras focus on life at Leeds Bradford airport during the summer of 2018. It may not be the UK's biggest, but what it lacks in size, it makes up for in ambition. With owners having green-lit a multi-million pound investment, the airport is undergoing a huge makeover. There are also problems for the staff due to an emergency landing after a plane's cockpit warning alarm shows its door is still open. Meanwhile, terminal manager Nathan has to deal with a blocked international arrivals door. Hugh Dennis narrates

programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: The airline auditors pay a surprise visit to Leeds Bradford airport, which leaves baggage boys Jimmy and Michael in fear for their jobs when they manage to lose a piece of luggage. Duty manager Nathan has to deal with a flood in the toilets next to an executive departure lounge, and new recruit Gabby faces a trial by fire at the Departure Gate. She has to tell the members of an irate family that they will not be sitting together on their flight to Palma, and struggles to control the ensuing confrontation

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever (1971)
programme.desc: James Bond investigates a diamond-smuggling operation, and discovers that behind the scheme is his insidious arch-enemy Blofeld, who is planning to construct a devastating orbital doomsday weapon powered by the precious stones, which will force world powers to disarm and give him global domination. Spy adventure, starring Sean Connery, Jill St John, Charles Gray, Bernard Lee and Lois Maxwell

programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson leaves his brain at home once more to play the bungling buffoon of few words. He goes shopping for a new TV, has problems with an itchy foot and takes a lucky girl for a night on the town - leaving the usual trail of chaos in his wake

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A routine trip to the dentist ends disastrously for Bean, and a quiet stroll in the park gradually turns into a pitched battle with a wasp. Rowan Atkinson stars, with appearances by Richard Wilson and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's clumsy alter ego returns to cause more chaos as he puts his dubious first aid skills to good use on an unconscious man in the street, makes a meal out of the simple task of posting a letter, and jets off for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hapless hero plans the Christmas holiday of a lifetime - but fate intervenes and pulls the rug out from under his feet, reducing what should have been the perfect festive season to a frantic comedy of errors. Slapstick, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's comic alter ego embarks on another disaster-filled outing when he treats his hotel room to a makeover but ends up causing devastation

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The bumbling hero tries his level best to turn a babysitting job into a fun-packed day at the fair, but predictably makes a hash of it. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A New Year's party falls flat, but Bean finds an ingenious way to beat the sales crowds and bag a bargain before getting down to some seriously ham-fisted DIY decorating. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: An orientation day gives the hapless Mr Bean a chance to revisit his school days, and it is not long before he lives up to his disaster-prone reputation. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson slips into silly mode once more as his comic alter ego visits the launderette and somehow manages to lose his trousers, getting himself into a real pickle as he tries to retrieve them. Fully dressed again, he moves on to the crazy golf course, where the relatively simple task of hitting the ball leads to utter chaos

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite idiot visits hospital to cure a nasty little problem, but proves to be a somewhat impatient outpatient, and later has trouble sleeping. Starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The blunderingly inept master of disaster goes for a haircut, but ends up styling the other customers' hair. Later, he causes chaos at a school fun day. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Happy Birthday Mr Bean
programme.desc: How the sitcom character - who featured in just 14 original episodes - has gone on to become a global superstar with an animated series and two top-grossing feature films. Rowan Atkinson's alter-ego has become an online phenomenon, with more than 110 million online fans and growing. This documentary features classic clips and interviews with Richard Curtis, Tony Robinson and Angus Deayton

programme.title: Airplane! (1980)
programme.desc: The passengers on board an ill-fated airliner become increasingly jittery when the flight crew flounder during a food-poisoning crisis. Spoof disaster movie, starring Robert Hays, Leslie Nielsen, Robert Stack and Lloyd Bridges

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers
programme.desc: Biologist, extreme angler and naturalist Jeremy Wade heads to the Amazon. Together with its tributaries, it contains an incredible 20 per cent of Earth's fresh water, and the immense forests it sustains generate a quarter of the oxygen needed for life on the planet. Disgorging more water than the next nine biggest rivers combined, this waterway is indeed a mighty affair. By tracing the epic migration of the dorado catfish, Jeremy discovers the issues putting this great river at risk - from leaking pipelines to giant dams. However, he also discovers tales of surprising hope

Guests Sue Perkins, Rose Matafeo and Munya Chawawa join the trio to round-up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: The Big Fat Quiz of Everything
programme.desc: Rob Beckett, Roisin Conaty, Nish Kumar, Katherine Ryan, Oti Mabuse and Rob Brydon join Jimmy Carr as he poses questions on anything and everything, with subjects including Only Fools and Horses, Johnny Cash and US tourist attractions. As always, Jimmy is helped by newsreader Jon Snow, actor Charles Dance and the children from Mitchell Brook Primary School

programme.title: Dude, Where's My Car? (2000)
programme.desc: Two friends wake up with the realisation they have absolutely no memory of the events of the night before. They set about retracing their steps - only to stumble across a host of crazy characters, a flock of marauding ostriches and a fanatical alien-worshipping cult. Comedy, starring Seann William Scott, Ashton Kutcher, Jennifer Garner and Kristy Swanson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Three spooky Halloween tales, in which Bart and Milhouse play tricks with a mysterious watch and Homer takes over as the Grim Reaper, only to discover Marge's name is on his list. With the voices of Alias star Jennifer Garner and boxer Oscar De La Hoya

programme.title: The Great
programme.desc: Catherine takes her first steps toward a coup, attempting to seduce Orlo in hopes of recruiting him to her cause. Peter receives Count Rostov, who requests to keep his beard to hide his pustules, even though Peter has outlawed beards. Comedy drama, starring Elle Fanning and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Children's food educator Beth Stephens hosts the first dinner party in Lowestoft, Suffolk, where she plans to impress her guests - caravan site owner Ray, beauty therapist Polly, housing officer Jonalt and ASBO officer Rachel - with locally sourced seasonal food. However, she and Rachel gang up on Ray for most of the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Caravan park owner Ray hosts the second night in Lowestoft, where he hopes to win the £1,000 prize with a Spanish-themed evening, complete with a homemade tropical zone and an Ibiza-style club night in a barn - despite it being the middle of winter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Luxury-loving beautician Polly hosts the third evening in Lowestoft, Suffolk, and is determined to prove she is more than just a pretty face. She opts for a fine-dining menu that stresses quality over quantity, and hopes her smart dress code will bring out the genteel side of her guests - but distractions soon emerge in the form of revelations about Ray once being a new romantic

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Albanian-born civil servant Jonalt hosts the fourth party of the competition in Lowestoft, Suffolk, and hopes his family recipes can impress his guests. He demonstrates a hidden talent that makes the diners laugh, and one contestant is left feeling the heat when Beth and Rachel unite

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final dinner party in Suffolk is hosted by anti-social behaviour officer Rachel, who hopes to win over her guests with an evening of comfort food and a few tricks up her sleeve. She hates to lose, but will need to curb her comments towards the other guests and let her dishes do the talking if she wants to be in with a chance of beating joint leaders Holly and Jonalt

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Day nine sees Brendan and the travellers go wild on jet skis, before relaxing at a luxury spa

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tax audit leads Homer into big trouble, leaving him with no choice but to make amends by helping the government nail Mr Burns for the theft of a trillion-dollar banknote

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is elected student president and immediately falls foul of Principal Skinner, who fools her into taking popular classes off the curriculum. Angry at his deception, she retaliates by calling her classmates out on strike. With the guest voice of film-maker Michael Moore

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tony Blair, JK Rowling and Ian McKellen are present to witness the Simpson family's arrival on holiday in London, where Homer crashes a rented car into the Queen's horse-drawn carriage and gets locked up in the Tower

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is filmed fleeing from a wild bear and becomes a local laughing stock. Determined to redeem himself and salvage his reputation, he builds a special protective suit and sets about organising a rematch - to be fought on his terms

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Belfast, where the first host is chatty PR manager Claire. She aims to impress with a menu made up of her favourite restaurant dishes, but never having plucked a pheasant before, she has a challenge on her hands. The guests she's hoping to impress are DJ Ryan, joiner and part-time inventor Neil, charity events manager Cailin, and window cleaning manager Paul, on a lively night filled with laughter, music and dancing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carpenter Neil hosts the second dinner party in and around Belfast in a bid to win the £1000 prize, presenting good old fashioned, country style cuisine to his guests. With a farmyard full of animals joining in the fun, discussions ranging from disabled chickens to eating stinging nettles and a guest performance from Neil's very own creation, ''head in a jar', it's proves to be a weird and wonderful experience out in the countryside

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debonair window cleaning business owner and keen golfer Paul has cut a dash already this week in and around Belfast with his sense of style, and now he hopes to impress with his fine food. For Ryan and Neil, most of the fancy fare is uncharted territory, and while Cailin and Claire are impressed with the fine dining, Paul sails close to the wind when he suggests that they might like to be his ladies-in-waiting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Livewire DJ and events organiser Ryan is the next to host in and around Belfast - and having arranged parties for thousands, is confident he can satisfy four fellow diners. Eccentric joiner Neil anticipates a madcap evening of fun, and with a hipster band playing in the living room, unexpected discoveries in the bedroom and several crises in the kitchen, certainly gets the entertainment he was hoping for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Belfast, Cailin hosts a Eurovision extravaganza. Her rivals have provided top-notch nosh and entertainment, but she believes that her tried-and-tested dishes from across Europe will land her the top spot

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin shows five properties to Rachel and Miguel, who have sold their house in Dorset and are now planning a permanent move to Spain's highly sought-after Orihuela Costa

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which a property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad. Jasmine Harman is on Spain's Costa Blanca to help Wendy and Lee find a traditional countryside property. The couple, their two children, their pet Doberman and their West African parrot are planning a permanent move to Spain and would like a four-bedroom detached house with plenty of outside space, all for their budget of £150,000. Can Jasmine find their perfect place?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge help Xuxa and Simon, who are keen to transform the Second World War air raid shelter in their garden into a craft room - the only problem is, the space is tiny, so Angel thinks up some creative space-saving solutions. They also get requests to help Lyra and her dad James, who want to make a new chicken coop, and Helena, whose 1960s stereogram record player is no longer spinning

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in the Kentish countryside. Kirstie helps doting father Charlie, who is recently divorced, and his two children find a new family home as they start a new chapter in their lives. Elsewhere, Phil meets Ella and Grant, a couple who are longing for their own space as they want to start a family

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist sets out to find his estranged father, who has gone missing while searching for the Holy Grail. Once reunited, the duo team up to finish the task and locate the sacred relic before the Nazis get their hands on it. Action adventure sequel directed by Steven Spielberg, the third instalment in the successful franchise. Harrison Ford stars as the titular hero, alongside Sean Connery, Alison Doody, River Phoenix, Julian Glover and Denholm Elliott

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: True Lies (1994)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary computer salesman leads a double life as a secret agent battling international terrorism. His naive wife is unaware of his dual employment, and goes in search of adventure - only to end up in the clutches of terrorists who have stolen a nuclear weapon. James Cameron's action comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jamie Lee Curtis and Tom Arnold

programme.title: The Last Leg

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Fifteen to One

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is awarded his own talk show and takes over Krusty's regular TV slot - but makes the mistake of tackling subjects suggested by Lisa. Inevitably, the ratings soon start tumbling and the spectre of cancellation looms. With the guest voices of Jackie Mason and A-Team star Mr T

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A baby riot breaks out at a children's concert in Springfield, so the town's childless community forms an anti-youth lobby. The initiative threatens to eliminate all child-friendly aspects of the area, until Marge decides to fight back with a cunning plan of her own

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.desc: There's a death in Springfield, while Krusty's confidence takes a beating after he appears on a TV comedy roast with Sarah Silverman and Jeff Ross, prompting him to retire from the business. Lisa becomes worried for Homer's safety, so sets out to prevent him getting hurt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge signs Homer and Bart up on a father-son bonding ocean voyage in a bid to heal their troubled relationship, and while the pair are away takes over Homer's fantasy football league. Animation, featuring the voice of Nick Offerman (Parks and Recreation)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge starts her own sandwich shop after her snacks become a huge hit at Springfield Elementary. However, running a business proves challenging - especially when the same franchise opens another location across the street

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Eco-disaster looms in Springfield when Mr Burns launches a controversial fracking operation - and while Homer is more than happy to play accomplice to his boss, an outraged Lisa calls on the services of bigshot politician Maxine Lombard (voiced by two-time Oscar winner Jane Fonda) to shut Burns down. Against the odds, however, the opponents end up falling for one another

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians (2012)
programme.desc: Magical beings from folklore, including Santa Claus, Jack Frost and the Easter Bunny, join forces to defeat the plans of an evil spirit, who intends to steal the dreams of children and use the power they grant him to dominate the world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Chris Pine, Alec Baldwin, Hugh Jackman, Isla Fisher and Jude Law

programme.title: Ferdinand (2017)
programme.desc: After a bull with a big heart is mistaken for a dangerous beast, he is captured and torn from his home. Determined to return to his family, he rallies a misfit team on the ultimate adventure. Animated comedy, with the voices of John Cena, Kate McKinnon and Bobby Cannavale

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: The Great
programme.desc: Peter nervously writes a speech for his military and Generals - his father's old buddies. Catherine presents her ideals for a new Russia to Orlo and Marial, who think these radical ideas need to be toned down. Comedy drama, starring Elle Fanning and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated viewers the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Mary and Marina, and Amira and Iqra look back on the year's biggest and best shows, including Strictly Come Dancing, Countdown, This Morning, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, CBeebies Bedtime Stories, The Undoing, First Dates, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Elephant, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown and Naked Attraction

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: A Bigger Splash (2015)
programme.desc: A rock star recovering from surgery retreats to the peaceful surroundings of a Mediterranean island with her lover. Their seclusion is disrupted by the arrival of an old flame and his estranged teenage daughter, and a complex, tempestuous relationship develops between the four of them, bringing old memories to the surface. Drama, starring Tilda Swinton and Ralph Fiennes

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.desc: Chloe and Aaron want to know how Nicolette's meeting went with Ricardo, and things seem good when Terese awards Amy the contract, but everything is about to go very wrong

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Wiltshire couple Edward Lea and his wife found their happy retirement was short-lived when an imposing 8ft breeze-block wall - dubbed the Great Wall of China - was built by their neighbour between their properties. In Scotland, Karen Ryrie and her elderly mother are fed up with living opposite John Tyer, his three dogs and a huge family of rabbits. Following their complaint about the smell, Karen's subsequent accusation of assault has made the dispute far more serious. Elsewhere, Linda Bird had not been expecting to wear headphones around the house when she moved to Bedfordshire for a quiet life, but the issue has escalated beyond excessive noise to become a battle over boundaries with neighbour Stanislav Fajdel

programme.title: Secrets That Kill (2020)
programme.desc: A woman is far from pleased when her mother returns from holiday with a younger husband. When a series of sinister mishaps befalls the family, she becomes even more suspicious of him - but the truth behind the incidents may not be down to the new arrival but dark secrets from the past. Thriller, starring Jillian Murray and Carolyn McCormick

programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ships
programme.desc: This behind-the-scenes look at life on board the Seven Seas Explorer features head sommelier Georgiana, as the vessel prepares for a special visit to Bordeaux. Cameras go below deck and take a peek at the unique connoisseur drinks cellar with its £3,000 bottle of cognac and observes members of the night crew as they work to get the ship looking as good as new for the morning

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: The comedian aboard her vintage camper van, explores the mountainous region of north-west England and the Lake District. She begins her 142-mile journey just south of Penrith, travelling down through the lakes, before heading west to finish near Keswick. Along the way she meets the people and visits the places that make this most scenic part of Britain unique. On Ullswater, Susan gets a chance to take charge of the oldest working passenger vessel in the world, the Lady of the Lake. Then she hears of Beatrix Potter's love of the region before heading the spooky Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A journey through Sicily that takes in seven Unesco World Heritage sites, with the first stop being a visit to a castle whose baron was inspired by Hampton Court. There's a meeting in Modica with Sicily's most famous chocolatier, a trip on the unique railway that travels around Etna, and a visit to Ragusa, a baroque-inspired city famous for its beauty and for its spiral railway that travels within a mountain

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Bad moments and falls from grace suffered by some top artists. Members of boyband 5ive exclusively open up about the feud that saw the chart-topping band split, while Eurovision's Surie speaks about her now infamous stage invasion that left her shaken but determined the show should go on. Bucks Fizz star Jay Aston recalls the time that their tour bus crashed, leaving the future of the band in jeopardy and Mike Nolan's life hanging in the balance. Plus, the moment singer James Arthur would rather forget, when some dubious tweets get him in the papers for all the wrong reasons. Narrated by Sarah Cawood

Including an Army veteran who was attacked with a knife, and a Polish couple forced to call the police after their neighbour threw petrol over one of them and threatened to burn down their conservatory

programme.title: How to Lose a Stone in a Month
programme.desc: Ruth Langsford invites four more people to test some of the world's most extreme weight-loss programmes, under the supervision of GP Dr Amir Khan of GPs: Behind Closed Doors fame. Those taking part include food fanatic Hannah, who thinks nothing of filling up on chocolate spread straight from the jar, student Simon, who has kept going throughout his dissertation with the help of custard creams, sugary teas and carb-heavy rice dishes, and Olivia, who tops up with secret bedtime snacks

programme.title: Wildlife SOS

programme.desc: Allan Chapman presents a profile of the 20th century's most celebrated scientist, Albert Einstein. His ideas were central to the development of many of today's technologies, including space travel, mobile phones, digital television and the atomic bomb

programme.title: The Secret Life of Puppies

programme.title: Escape to the Farm with Kate Humble
programme.desc: The presenter works to prepare for the winter ahead, laying hedges to protect the crops and wildlife, herding the animals under cover before the weather turns, and arranging for some rams to mate with her flock of sheep. Kate also ventures out for a twilight walk, on the lookout for badgers and tawny owls, and visits a local apple farm, where she acquires some fruit to make a pork and cider casserole, accompanied by mulled cider

programme.title: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is on hold as summer continues, with unexpectedly balmy conditions throwing a life line to the roe deer as they prepare for the winter ahead. For other animals, mating season has arrived, making for a dangerous and testosterone-fuelled time at Ravenscar Beach

programme.title: World War II in Numbers
programme.desc: Documentary using recorded figures and statistics to outline the full extent of the conflict, explaining the horrors of war and how it ever came to take place. The programme begins by looking at the story of Franz Honiok, a 43-year-old farmer who is often considered the first victim of the Second World War, before going on to show that when Germany invaded Poland in August 1939, no one was ready for war

programme.title: 5 News Weekend

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Highlights of the singer's voyages around the Mediterranean, which has seen her visit places including Rome, Florence, Pisa, Monte Carlo, Monaco and Barcelona

programme.title: Posh Hotels with Sally & Nigel
programme.desc: In Dartmoor National Park, Sally Lindsay, Nigel Havers and poodle Charlie explore Bovey Castle, a luxury golf and spa resort occupying a former manor house, which is one of the few posh hotels where man's best friend is also welcomed. Nigel's suite comes with a complimentary Barbour jacket for Charlie, which he wears while enjoying a spot of deerstalking. Sally prepares a venison dinner for the hunters' return, part of a £500-per-head dining experience, before enjoying a round of golf on Bovey's famous championship course, a favourite with professional players and celebrities alike

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: Some of the dramatic events to have taken place at Windsor Castle, which was built more than 900 years, guided by Edward III and his obsession with tales of Camelot. There is a look at one of the most popular exhibits at Windsor - Queen Mary's Dolls' House - and Kate Williams revisits some of the castle's darker times, including the year when bubonic plague caused Queen Elizabeth to isolate at Windsor, and the death of Prince Albert in 1861

programme.title: Wallis Simpson: Femme Fatale
programme.desc: A profile of Wallis Simpson, focusing on her early years before she met the future king, asking whether she was a scheming seductress or one of the most maligned women in history. Her first marriage, to a heavy-drinking US naval officer, was a tempestuous on-off relationship, and in 1928, she married her first British husband, Ernest Aldrich Simpson, an English-American shipping executive. However, it wasn't until three years later that she was introduced to the Prince of Wales at an event at Burrough Court - a meeting that was to spark an infamous period in British history

programme.title: The Best of Bad TV
programme.desc: A look back at the decade that brought many opportunities for eye-popping errors, but few more ill-conceived than sitcom Heil Honey I'm Home!, which featured fictionalised versions of Adolf Hitler and Eva Braun living next door to a Jewish couple. The intention was to spoof 1950s American sitcoms, but most critics felt the show fell short on taste and decency

They've wiped out their savings and invested 50,000 euros in the refurb. But tourism has been quiet this year and their potential goldmine has had to stay shut for six months. They've now got a date to reopen - but have they got their timing right? Cameras also return to Saydo Park, an enclave full of static caravans, mobile homes and Brits at the foot of the Andalusian Mountains

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Highlights of Jane's cruise from Miami, around the Caribbean to Puerto Rico

programme.title: Strategic Air Command (1955)
programme.desc: A pilot relishes the opportunity to return to the baseball pitch once the Second World War is over. However, his sporting career is put on hold when he's drafted back into the US Air Force and given the opportunity to fly a revolutionary new jet. Drama, starring James Stewart, Frank Lovejoy, Barry Sullivan, Alex Nicol and June Allyson

programme.title: Ministry of Fear (1944)
programme.desc: An innocent man recently released from a mental hospital inadvertently takes possession of a piece of microfilm meant for a Nazi agent, and finds himself on the run from both the police and the Nazis. Spy thriller based on Graham Greene's novel, starring Ray Milland, Marjorie Reynolds, Carl Esmond and Hillary Brooke

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)
programme.desc: The black sheep of a family falls in with a gang of outlaws plotting to rob a train operated by his strait-laced brother, but reckons without his sibling's determination to track him down and set him back on the straight and narrow. Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde

programme.title: To Hell and Back (1955)
programme.desc: Biopic of actor Audie Murphy, following his service in the Second World War. Enlisting in the Army as a teenager to support his younger siblings, he excelled himself in action in the conflict in Europe and became one of America's most decorated soldiers. Starring Murphy as himself alongside Marshall Thompson, Charles Drake and Gregg Palmer

programme.title: Fantastic Four (2015)
programme.desc: A gifted young scientist joins a secret project researching inter-dimensional travel, and they return from a journey to another world having been granted superhuman powers. Their abilities make them the only hope for Earth's survival when a colleague who was lost on their expedition returns to wreak vengeance. Superhero adventure, starring Miles Teller, Michael B Jordan, Kate Mara and Jamie Bell

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123 (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless criminal and his gang hijack a crowded New York subway train and demand a $1million ransom, threatening to shoot a passenger every minute after the deadline expires. As the deadline looms, a transit police detective struggles to cut through City Hall red tape and negotiate the safe release of the innocent people on board. Thriller, starring Walter Matthau, Robert Shaw, Martin Balsam, Hector Elizondo, Earl Hindman and James Broderick

programme.title: Army of Darkness - Director's Cut (1992)
programme.desc: Zombie-battling hero Ash is transported back in time to the medieval era. In an attempt to find a way back to his own time, he accidentally summons up a horde of living skeletons led by his own evil double and must fight to send them back to the grave. Extended version of Sam Raimi's comedy fantasy adventure sequel to Evil Dead II, starring Bruce Campbell and Embeth Davidtz

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone

programme.title: Harry and the Hendersons (1987)
programme.desc: A hapless family's camping holiday in the mountains is brought to a sudden end when they accidentally hit the legendary Bigfoot with their car. They decide to adopt the endearing creature, but have more trouble than expected trying to keep him concealed and to avoid arousing their neighbours' suspicions. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Melinda Dillon, David Suchet, Don Ameche and Kevin Peter Hall

programme.title: Two by Two (2015)
programme.desc: Two strange creatures and their children are barred from getting on board Noah's Ark, but manage to sneak in. When the kids fall overboard, they face a struggle for survival as the flood waters rise, while their distraught parents must work together to rescue them. Animated adventure, with the voices of Tara Flynn and Dermot Magennis

programme.title: Three Amigos! (1986)
programme.desc: Three silent Western movie stars are summoned to Mexico for what they think will be a public appearance - only to discover the locals really believe in their heroic abilities and expect them to rid their town of a group of evil bandits. Comedy, starring Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short

programme.title: Knight and Day (2010)
programme.desc: A woman has a chance encounter with a rogue secret agent, who has been framed as a traitor and is on the run from his own superiors. Realising she has been mistaken for his accomplice and is in danger for knowing too much, the fugitive kidnaps her and drags her on a dangerous journey around the world, as he sets out to clear his name and protect a vitally important invention. Comedy adventure, with Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz and Viola Davis

programme.title: A Walk in the Woods (2015)
programme.desc: A travel writer decides to hike the Appalachian Trail, a 2,200-mile journey through some of America's most rugged terrain. However, the only companion he can find for his exhibition is a roguish old friend, who sees it as an opportunity to get out of paying his debts. Fact-based drama adapted from Bill Bryson's travel book, starring Robert Redford, Nick Nolte and Emma Thompson

programme.title: Escape from New York (1981)
programme.desc: Former special forces soldier Snake Plissken is sentenced to life on Manhattan Island, an anarchic penal colony for the most dangerous criminals. When Air Force One is hijacked and crashes there, Snake is coerced into rescuing the US president from prisoners holding him hostage. John Carpenter's sci-fi action adventure, with Kurt Russell, Donald Pleasence, Lee Van Cleef, Adrienne Barbeau and Isaac Hayes

programme.title: Escape Plan (2013)
programme.desc: An expert takes a contract from the CIA to test a maximum security prison by trying to break out of it, but he soon discovers he has been duped and that his captors intend him to stay inside for ever. He hatches a plan to escape, but to succeed he will need the help of a long-term convict - who wants his own freedom in return for assistance. Thriller, with Sylvester Stallone and Arnold Schwarzenegger

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go! (1966)
programme.desc: International Rescue is called in to save the first manned space mission to Mars from sinister hijacker The Hood, and ensure a second attempt goes to plan. Puppet adventure based on Gerry Anderson's TV series, featuring the voices of Shane Rimmer, Ray Barrett, Alexander Davion, Peter Dyneley, Sylvia Anderson and Cliff Richard, voicing a puppet version of himself

programme.title: The Choice (2016)
programme.desc: Two neighbours find themselves overwhelmingly attracted to each other, and make substantial changes in their lives to be together - one breaking off a long-term relationship and the other conquering his fear of commitment. Over the next 10 years, their feelings for each other are tested by a series of challenges. Romantic drama based on Nicholas Sparks' novel, starring Benjamin Walker and Teresa Palmer

programme.title: The Man Who Would Be King (1975)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers in 19th-century India travel to an unexplored land, where one of them fools the natives into believing he is a god. However, his growing delusions of grandeur put him at loggerheads with his comrade-in-arms. Adventure based on the Rudyard Kipling story, directed by John Huston, starring Sean Connery, Michael Caine, Saeed Jaffrey, Christopher Plummer and Shakira Caine

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: X-Men: Apocalypse (2016)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes face the oldest and most powerful of their kind, an ancient Egyptian tyrant who is restored to life in the 1980s and plans to destroy civilisation and rebuild it in his own image. Superhero adventure sequel, starring James McAvoy, Michael Fassbender, Jennifer Lawrence and Oscar Isaac

programme.title: Sweet Sixteen (2002)
programme.desc: A boy tries to save his jailbird mother from danger on the streets of a Scottish coastal town, by creating a safe haven where she can escape the grasp of the two men in her life. However, his efforts to raise the necessary funds lead him and his friends into all manner of schemes, and he is soon dangerously out of his depth. Ken Loach's drama, starring Martin Compston, Annmarie Fulton, William Ruane, Michelle Coulter and Gary McCormack

programme.title: Rudderless (2014)
programme.desc: A grieving father in a downward spiral stumbles across a box of his recently deceased son's demo tapes and lyrics. Shocked by the discovery of this unknown talent, he forms a band in the hope of finding some catharsis. Comedy directed by William H. Macy, starring Billy Crudup, Anton Yelchin and Felicity Huffman

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin and Barney panic half an hour before the wedding, with the bride-to-be convinced it is a bad omen that she never found the locket. Ted attempts to calm her down, and debates whether he should tell the truth about the necklace's location. Lily and Marshall help Barney with his vows, and discover they may not have stuck to their own. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ted says his goodbyes to the gang after Barney and Robin's wedding day, and prepares for his new life in Chicago. However, he has a fateful encounter with someone at Farhampton railway station. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Harry Hill presents as the young bakers show off their dessert skills, with a technical challenge in the shape of an animal - with the ultimate height and jiggle - and decorative trifles for the showstopper. Their efforts are judged by Liam Charles and Ravneet Gill

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Love is in the air for some couples, although as other relationships are put to the test, the experts put an intervention in place at the newlyweds' first commitment ceremony

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's girlfriend Emily (Laura Spencer) gives Penny the cold shoulder when she learns about his past. Meanwhile, the guys debate investing in Stuart's comic-book shop and becoming part owners of the business. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife disrupts their plans. Santiago asks Jeffords to write a letter of recommendation for her, while Holt and Diaz enlist Gina's assistance with a difficult interrogation. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt and Peralta contract mumps during an investigation, so the pair elect to be quarantined together in the hope that they can use the time to solve the case. Diaz tries to help Boyle through the mourning process for his dog, and Jeffords is forced to clean up Hitchcock and Scully's mess. Oscar Nunez guest stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldon's test subject when he agrees to help her with her maths homework, while Georgie joins Mary's bible study group to spend more time with a girl he has his eye on

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Sheldon becomes ill and spends a few days in hospital, he turns into the world's worst patient. His behaviour takes a toll on everyone, and Missy gets a taste of what her life would be like if she didn't have a twin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a meltdown when she feels the pressure of what it would mean for women everywhere if she were to win a Nobel Prize. Raj and Howard attempt to relive the good old days when Howard buys a scooter that looks like the one he had years earller

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is worried that people won't take him seriously in his own field after publishing a paper that suggests he may have discovered alien life. Penny encourages Leonard to stand up for himself when he aims to become the principal investigator on a plasma physics study

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Part one of two. A member of staff falls into a coma, putting Dr Cox and Nurse Roberts' debate about destiny into perspective. Keeping a watchful eye on the NannyCam, Carla realises just what a distraction Isabella's beautiful new babysitter is proving for Turk, while Elliot and the Janitor cheer up a dying patient, but leave Dr Kelso feeling undermined

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Nurse Roberts' condition deteriorates, the team begins to deal with the possibility that she could die. Carla finds comfort from an unlikely source, and JD resorts to childish mischief - until he makes a mature bid to be godfather to Dr Cox and Jordan's new baby. Comedy, starring Zach Braff

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe volunteer at the school dance, but get themselves kicked out by the school's vice principal for bad behaviour. Meanwhile, Ryder considers breaking up with Stella. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel takes Joe's side when he is involved in a hit-and-run accident, until she discovers that the other driver is her beloved hairdresser Calista. Meanwhile, Ryder tries to win Stella back during lessons, much to the frustration of their teacher. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy has to go undercover at a women's prison and befriend one of the inmates in order to try to get information about a criminal operation. Back at the precinct, Holt and the team plan a fake funeral in an attempt to catch a hitman

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After identifying the mob informant, Holt, Jake and Rosa make plans to infiltrate FBI headquarters to get the man's files, with the captain bringing in his former partner to help out. Guest starring Dennis Haysbert (24's President Palmer)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The Coopers help a broken-hearted Pastor Jeff through a rough patch in his marriage. Sheldon pressures church members for donations when Mary takes him to work for a day

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Meemaw learns more about Dr Sturgis's past and Georgie's desire for cable TV leads to a stand-off between him and George Sr

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard fears he is wasting his time with Penny and ends up spending the night with fellow scientist Leslie. However, he is disappointed when she later tells him she was only interested in a one-night stand. Meanwhile, Sheldon frets over a change to his hamburger routine. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys' social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Penny's ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode of the soap from 2013. The net starts to close in on killer Will Savage, and he lures his family to the house where Tom is being held hostage

programme.desc: Move-in day for the couples proves to test some relationships and strengthen others, and with the introduction of 'yes week' shocking truths are set to be revealed. Arguments erupt as one wife makes her move on another husband

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Another chance to see the special Stand Up to Cancer edition of the TV review series, originally shown during the night of fundraising in October 2018, with Louis Tomlinson and Liam Payne, Danny and Dani Dyer, Dele Alli and Eric Dier, and Peter Crouch and Abbey Clancy taking to their sofas. What do they think of The Haunting of Hill House, The X Factor, University Challenge, The Yorkshire Vet, Naked Attraction and more?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: A review of recent shows to hit the small screen, featuring the appearance of celebrity guests in support of Channel 4's 2017 Stand Up to Cancer initiative. The show features Jeremy Corbyn and Jessica Hynes; Liam Gallagher, with his mother Peggy and his son Gene; Freddie Flintoff and Jamie Redknapp; Ed Sheeran, Big Narstie and Example; and Ozzy and Sharon Osbourne. The programmes under scrutiny include University Challenge, Strictly Come Dancing, Nigella: At My Table, Blue Planet II and First Dates. From November 2017

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A selection of familiar celebrity faces, including Sharon and Kelly Osbourne, Tyra Banks and Meghan Trainor. Shows watched include The Masked Singer, Elephant, Raiders of the Lost Ark, The Last Dance and RuPaul's Drag Race. From May 2020

programme.title: Gogglebox
