programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: David Baddiel, Ed Gamble, Jo Brand, Katy Wix and Rose Matafeo are now waist-deep in the Taskmaster swamp. This time, David goes topless and Katy robs a piggy bank (of its undercarriage). Meanwhile, Greg Davies' assistant Alex Horne is powerless in the face of Ed's creative vision

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: After his unsuccessful first attempt, chicken farmer Griff hopes it will be second time lucky with his new match Emily, and the two bond over poultry, pet dogs and favourite serial killers. Lottery winner Sharon (48) meets 52-year-old paramedic Andy, who used to be a beer and wine merchant, and their date goes so well that they head outside on an impromptu moonlit ghost hunt

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie celebrate the motel being fully booked for the first time. David goes out on a date with Patrick. Sitcom, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny attempt to prove Sheldon wrong when he claims that he and Amy have a superior relationship. Meanwhile, Howard is nervous when Nasa asks him to throw the first pitch at a baseball game honouring National Space Day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's girlfriend Emily (Laura Spencer) gives Penny the cold shoulder when she learns about his past. Meanwhile, the guys debate investing in Stuart's comic-book shop and becoming part owners of the business. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Harry wants a wedding fit for royalty, but his partner Charlotte is not into airs and graces and is dreaming of something much more low key

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Impulsive groom Steve plans a cliff-hanger of a Wild West wedding, but demanding bride-to-be Leona dreams of a more sophisticated do

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Reality experiment in which experts select compatible couples from a long list of applicants, then invite them to marry - despite them never having met before

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: With the weddings wrapped up, it's time for the four remaining couples to get up-close and personal in exotic locations during the honeymoon phase of the experiment

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard receives shocking news as everyone prepares for the re-opening of the comic-book store. Penny tries to teach Sheldon how to 'let it go', but she is unable to follow her own advice when she learns something infuriating about Amy. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Fillion, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny agree to participate in an unusual experiment, and Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily spend the evening trying to escape from a 'zombie'. Elsewhere, Howard and Bernadette run into trouble at the airport after returning from Mrs Wolowitz's funeral. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Trouble arises when Amy learns that Sheldon has applied for a one-way mission to colonise Mars. Meanwhile, Leonard surprises Penny with a gift, and Raj decides to snoop around Emily's flat after she is called back to work during their evening together. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset when a magazine fails to mention him in an article about the paper he co-wrote with Sheldon. Meanwhile, a power cut at Mrs Wolowitz's home leads to a final family dinner in her honour. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard and Sheldon are invited to speak at UC Berkeley, they decide to take a detour and try to meet one of their idols - Star Wars director George Lucas. Meanwhile, Raj and Amy offer to settle a dispute with a game of table tennis. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard finds out that he has a half-brother, Sheldon and Amy have a platonic sleepover, and Penny gets an offer to audition for a Kevin Smith film. American comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is asked to create a message on the off-chance a Nasa mission discovers alien life, and the guys fight over what he should do. Meanwhile, Penny contemplates returning to acting. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Gods of Egypt (2016)
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian god is driven into exile when his evil brother murders their father and seizes his throne. He enlists the aid of a human thief in restoring justice, and in return offers to help the mortal to bring his murdered lover back to life. Fantasy adventure, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Brenton Thwaites, Gerard Butler and Chadwick Boseman

programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Youth worker Tom's luggage has gone missing so he wears a borrowed waiter's uniform on his date with dancer Francesca, who is looking for a reformed bad boy who she can take back to meet her Italian father. programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is taught how to bind books by expert Isabelle Ting, and reveals how to create a notebook from leftover materials including leather offcuts, recycled leather coats and decorative paper

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman shows retired North Lanarkshire couple Bill and Maureen Hughes five properties in and around the town of Fort Myers, Florida, within their budget of £320,000. The pair hope to create a whole new chapter of family memories - and escape the ravages of the Scottish winter

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain looking for items to fix up and flog on behalf of their owners. In this episode they're close to the Malvern Hills. Henry picks two saddles from horse owner Sabrina and converts them into bar stools, while Simon makes a handsome profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Leeds and Preston in search of people's junk and clutter to upcycle into valuable new items. Henry makes an international set of clocks out of dashboard time pieces, while Simon builds an eccentric chandelier from car headlights

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: With the holiday season fast approaching, Stephanie enlists close family friend Gerry and her mother Isobel to get her B&B room finished in time. Lee and Belinda plan to create a new outdoor events space for their first wedding booking. To go the extra mile, the south London couple aim to construct a water feature, and call on Dick for advice - but things don't go to plan. Jayne and Steve rope in their friends to finish renovating the ground floor, and the promise of a thank-you meal keeps spirits high, although dinner could end up being served cold

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Kevin and Liz Davies, who plan to build a five-bedroom home complete with a swimming pool in north Somerset. They are expecting to spend around £610,000, but realise they must rethink the sink with a view and woodburner when the presenter casts his eye over the designs

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a 'hairy' experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyone's taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Geri kicks off proceedings by demanding to know why Sarah and Luke did not want a return visit to Greenways of Malvern, before they in turn confront Sanjeev and Elinor over their low cleanliness score for Ferry Lodge. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son building an ambitious clifftop retreat and a young architect embarking on his first commission - a garden pavilion for his grandmother. Master craftsman Will Hardie sets out to transform the humble beach hut into the most unlikely of holiday getaways, and in Germany, George visits a modern house in a medieval town

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. Kendari the babirusa - a bizarre-looking creature also known as a deer-pig - is trying to give birth, but is being disturbed by a couple of mischievous otters. Young male orang-utan Willie struggles to impress the females, while Raz the aye-aye, a rare nocturnal primate related to lemurs, is being encouraged to share his home with two jumping rats

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie gets green-fingered as she sets out to restore the chateau's original greenhouse, which has recently been damaged in a storm. Lee and Belinda continue to expand their new outdoor venue. When their first wedding falls through, they fortunately get a new booking for a 60th birthday, but then end up in a race against time to get the garden party ready. With 12 acres of land to enjoy, Dick and Angel make sure their Wellington boots have a home, creating bootjacks for the newly renovated boot room

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Siobhan McSweeney hosts the 2021 series as 12 of Britain's best home potters compete to become champion. In this first episode, judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller set the potters two challenges against the clock - to throw a cheese set and port chalices

programme.title: Rebecka Martinsson: Arctic Murders
programme.desc: Part one of two. A 16-year-old cold case is reopened when a woman's body is found as a result of the demolition of an old hotel on the outskirts of Kiruna. The case is personal for Sven-Erik, who had known the woman and her family all those years ago and had never let go of the missing woman's case. The investigation also becomes dangerously personal for Rebecka at the same time as she is dealing with a major health issue for Sivving. Thriller, starring Sascha Zacharias, Eva Melander and Thomas Oredsson. In Swedish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, 32, is brought to resus with a head injury after having an epileptic seizure, and he is sent for an urgent CT scan to assess the damage to his brain. Anastasia, 80, comes to urgent care with a pain in her leg and while she is sent for an X-ray to rule out a blood clot, she shares the story of her arrival to study in England from Nigeria, only for civil war to break out back home. Porter Chris, who's been part of the A&E department for 25 years, shares his insights into the job as he goes about his day

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The department treats a 31-year-old biker who was involved in a head-on collision, and a teenager left with injuries to his hand after punching through a window. Plus, Resus team members struggle to revive two elderly patients, and discuss what they would want done for them in a similar situation

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, 32, is brought to resus with a head injury after having an epileptic seizure, and he is sent for an urgent CT scan to assess the damage to his brain. Anastasia, 80, comes to urgent care with a pain in her leg and while she is sent for an X-ray to rule out a blood clot, she shares the story of her arrival to study in England from Nigeria, only for civil war to break out back home. Porter Chris, who's been part of the A&E department for 25 years, shares his insights into the job as he goes about his day

Plus, Resus team members struggle to revive two elderly patients, and discuss what they would want done for them in a similar situation

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Bishop Brennan orders Ted and Dougal to campaign against a controversial film - but as a result of their protest it becomes the biggest box-office hit in Craggy Island's history. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the team's favourite investigations. Kate Quilton learns how a special enzyme contained in pineapples attacks and destroys dead skin cells in the mouth, with scientists using this enzyme to treat the victims of burns. Jimmy Doherty investigates the catastrophic effects of not getting enough vitamin D when he meets a boy who has rickets, while Matt Tebbutt finds out how a Lincolnshire business produces 1.5 million bottles of elderflower cordial without employing a single flower-picker

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Anne-Marie McNeill from Scotland have fallen in love with the buzzy holiday atmosphere of south Tenerife after visiting regularly for seven years. Now they're looking for a second home where they can enjoy family holidays with their two children, so Laura Hamilton shows them five properties for their £200,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Reg and Sarah Etwaroo from East Sussex are buying their first ever place together, and have their hearts set on a second home in the theme park capital of the world - Orlando in Florida. Ben Hillman shows the recently married couple properties for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Maggie Meigh from Northamptonshire have long dreamed of retiring to a warmer climate and are now selling their house in the UK so that they can to move full-time to the stunning Portuguese island of Madeira. With a budget of £330,000, Scarlette Douglas shows them five homes on the island's dramatic south coast

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Glasgow is this week's destination as Kirstie Allsopp joins young couple Steph and Nick, who are buying their first home together. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer searches around Bearsden for Ranald and Marjorie, who want a bungalow to retire to. However, rather than downsizing, these fun-loving grandparents want more space to entertain family and friends - and to keep their vintage rally car

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Four sets of campsite proprietors battle it out to be named best value, with the competition beginning at Amber's Bell Tent Camping in Mannington, Norfolk

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second day of the competition is at Park Farm Camping and Caravan Site in Norfolk, where husband and wife team Derek and Julie Nice are proud to show off their budget, family-friendly site. Former marksman Derek treats his guests to a spot of clay pigeon shooting, bringing out his competitive side

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to 500-year-old Layer Marney Tower in Essex for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed into luxury glamping lodges by Nick and Sheila Charrington. The guests have little to complain about with the accommodation, but a revelation over dinner changes how they see things. Plus, a treasure hunt organised by the hosts sends one team on a wild goose chase

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Day four is at the Foxhunter Park in Kent, where brother and sister Jane Stacey and Russell Saunders own a caravan site that includes a bistro and entertainment. The accommodation is luxurious but the large scale of the site does not sit well with the campers - and the evening entertainment of a fire-eating limbo dancer leaves most of them cold

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The campers meet for the final time to find out what they thought one another's stay was worth. Amber is offended by Derek's low scoring, while he is thrown by Nick and Sheila's feedback. Russell and Jane have an axe to grind with Derek whose low scoring of their park is made worse by what they see as a personal attack on their hosting, while Nick and Sheila appear to emerge relatively unscathed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Make-up artist Jules Osmany hosts the first of the week's dinner parties in Northamptonshire, and hopes her Indian-Moroccan fusion menu and laid-back attitude will win her the £1,000 prize. Joining her are tomboy Lauren Oxlade, stay-at-home mum Stephanie Reeder, MD Carl Johnson and funeral service manager Peter Pickering

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Funeral service manager Peter Pickering hosts the second dinner party in Northamptonshire, hoping his traditional approach will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, one guest does not like bread and butter pudding, and Stephanie is horrified by Jules's shocking revelation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: As the third party from Northamptonshire gets under way, stay-at-home mum Stephanie Reeder's nerves are evident as she plans to serve classic fish and chips, while offering a glamorous clothes-swapping session for entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business planning manager Lauren Oxlade is the penultimate host in Northamptonshire. She reveals herself to be the dark horse of the competition when she invites a few surprising friends along to the party, and impresses with her organisational skills and passionate cooking style

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to try his hand in Northamptonshire is managing director and proud northerner Carl Johnson, with a menu that includes gammon cooked in two litres of cola. Stephanie and Lauren are treated to a glimpse of the host in all his glory when they see what he has hanging above his bed - but it remains to be seen what the guests will make of his lumpy chocolate mousse

programme.title: Chatsworth House: A Great British Year
programme.desc: An invasion of moths attack the 170-year-old carpet in the Sixth Duke's library, while the gardens are reopened, and on the estate farms, 3500 new lambs are born

programme.title: The Yorkshire Dales and the Lakes
programme.desc: Return of the documentary following life in the national parks. In Appletreewick in the Dales, pub landlord David Aynesworth has a special night up his sleeve

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital in London face a busy day dealing with brain injuries, including 65-year-old cabbie Charlie Brown, whom doctors worry has suffered a haemorrhage in a car accident, and 89-year-old Peggy Pierce, who has been rushed in following a suspected stroke. In the waiting room, a woman is comforted by her ex-boyfriend while she awaits treatment for a cut finger

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients dealt with at King's College Hospital, London include a man who was stabbed in his own home and has injuries to his lung, arm and liver, and an elderly woman injured in a fall. A former international lawyer who lost his wife, family and home to alcoholism decides to make a change after being treated with care and compassion

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack is declared dead after drinking too much floor polish - and Ted is astounded to learn he has been left a fortune in the will. However, he has to fulfil certain conditions before collecting the money

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack, Dougal and Ted head off for a summer break at a caravan park. However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as team captain Sean Lock and Joe Wilkinson take on guest captain Richard Ayoade and Aisling Bea. Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen to adjudicate in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital in London face a busy day dealing with brain injuries, including 65-year-old cabbie Charlie Brown, whom doctors worry has suffered a haemorrhage in a car accident, and 89-year-old Peggy Pierce, who has been rushed in following a suspected stroke. In the waiting room, a woman is comforted by her ex-boyfriend while she awaits treatment for a cut finger

A former international lawyer who lost his wife, family and home to alcoholism decides to make a change after being treated with care and compassion

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The attractive author of a steamy novel comes to stay on Craggy Island - and it is not long before Ted mistakenly jumps to the conclusion that she has fallen for him. Guest starring Gemma Craven

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Will Hardie and George struggle to bring ancient Roman technology back to life and the build on their log cabin in the wilderness begins in earnest, while the road trip around Italy takes in an impressive fire station. The architect also meets David Moreton, a former Paralympic swimmer hoping to turn an old air ambulance into an amphibious crash pad for his charity fundraising tours, and DIY enthusiasts Ben and Michelle, who want to build a summerhouse for free, using hundreds of disused shipping pallets

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Sue and Simon bought their four-bedroom Hertfordshire home in 2014, but the fake-Victorian extension has given the property a bad layout which is proving something of a nightmare. The couple also believe their home is by far the ugliest on their street. Enter architect Laura Jane Clark, who specialises in breathing new life into unappealing spaces. She has a plan to entirely transform the interior by moving the staircase, putting in skylights and installing an innovative revolving wall. However, Sue and Simon have a tight budget of £50,000 - and that's before they've even started on the exterior

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The host visits Ben at his ground floor apartment in St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex. George's challenge is to turn a grand drawing room with sea views into a cool, elegant kitchen-diner and create rich, opulent schemes for a bedroom and study. In Manchester, he tackles a 1930s semi-detached where the compact dimensions are proving a headache. With only a tiny budget to work with, can he make a cramped galley kitchen both functional and beautiful?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: New Zealander Steve Levy kicks off a week of dinner parties in Exeter, where he hopes his home-inspired menu consisting of a prawn starter, a fish main course and two desserts will impress his guests - administrator Estelle Macrow, media sales executive Richard Kaye, customer services adviser Sarah Wallis and PR guru Glen King - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Media sales executive and music mad foodie Richard Kaye hosts the second dinner party in Exeter, where he is confident he can impress his guests with his culinary knowledge, and hopes to dazzle one diner in particular

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-assured PR worker Glen King is confident she will be the 'hostess with the mostest' in Exeter, and has gone all-out to impress - even co-ordinating the dishes with her surname. She appears to be unflappable in the kitchen and seems to have a plan for everything to fall perfectly into place - but will it?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer services adviser Sarah Wallis is the fourth host in Exeter, and despite holding back all week she hopes to come out of her shell with an evening full of humour. The guests are welcomed in a terrifying manner, before being served some rather unusual cocktails

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Exeter, singleton Estelle Macrow is keen to discover whether she has the ability to successfully host a dinner party. Sarah Wallis, music-mad food connoisseur Richard Kaye, New Zealander Steve Levy and PR bod Glen King await her piece de resistance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Swallows Rest in Weymouth, Dorset, where hosts Jane and Keith Smith are pulling out all the stops to win. However, the colour combinations in the rooms do not go down well with rival B&B owner Ray Chowdhury, and an afternoon of drawing starts some competition between Ray and newlyweds James and Darren Kosa-Jones

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Burley Inn in the New Forest, where newlyweds Darren and James welcome their guests. Donna and David prove to have a critical eye when they discover holes in the sheets, and Jane and Keith have a disagreement over a toilet roll. In the afternoon, the couple reveal their quizmaster skills, before Ray grills them on how they run their B&B over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Hotel Montville in Redditch, Worcestershire for the third day of the competition, where first impressions of Ray Chowdhury's unique style and decor are positive. However, room inspections leave Jane and Keith Smith threatening not to stay, and the guests grill their host about his business background at dinner. Although some light relief is given in the form of ice sculpting, breakfast disappoints James and Darren Kosa-Jones, and Ray must face the harsh reality of his guests' opinions at feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to Donna and David's Silverton B&B in Shrewsbury, where the complimentary earplugs soon have Darren and James worrying about the noise from the road outside. A Segway race helps whip up the guests' competitive spirit, Donna gets emotional when her work-life balance is questioned, and chef David proves he can handle the unexpected at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner announced. Swallows Rest is first up and hosts Jane and Keith want to find out about Ray's colour preferences. Next Darren and James of the Burley Inn quiz Ray over his fussiness around their pine furniture. When it comes to the Silverton, B&B team Donna and David take umbrage with Jane and Keith's comments

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alarm-company owner Bill Black kicks off a series of dinner parties in Dundee, where he hopes his belt-busting menu will impress his guests - proud Arbroathian Phil Petrie, English student Hannah Wilson, ferret fancier Alex Pithouse and 28-year-old Kim Gillespie - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Architectural technician Alex Pithouse hosts the second dinner party in Dundee, and aims to impress his guests by giving them an education in fine dining, complete with a complex menu and some good wines, as well as by introducing them to his three pet ferrets

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian Hannah Wilson prepares an Italian feast for her guests in Dundee, and in a bid to win over her carnivore guests she devises a cunning plan that involves dishing up some meat with the starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth night in Dundee is hosted by self-styled food critic Phil Petrie, who has been unimpressed with the culinary standard so far. He hopes to impress with his evening, but things begin to go wrong when he runs out of ingredients and leaves his guests feeling hungry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Dundee, Kim Gillespie plans an ambitious menu, largely based on Yorkshire delights, with exotic dishes from Spain and Thailand also featuring - all accompanied by a Scottish choir singing American songs

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Colin Mackinnon and his partner Marta Briongos take on an ambitious project to build a bespoke metal home next to an airfield runway, designed by one of Scotland's most eminent architects and inspired by aircraft hangars. They have to contend with violent rain, snow, 100mph winds and the worst storms for a century, and the couple have to draw on their reserves of mental energy, as what was supposed to be a 12-month build heads into a third year

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 77-year-old former motorbike racer arrives with a potentially deadly swelling of the main artery that could burst at any moment. His only option is major surgery, which could be dangerous at his age. A woman whose boyfriend was killed in a cycling accident a year previously is also injured while on her bike, and a medical technician and a mobile caterer talk about their roles in aiding people to recovery

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. The night's most dramatic case occurs when a father and son are brought in with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by gatecrashers at a family birthday party, one of whom was armed with a samurai sword

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Natalka Greenwood and Sam Watson treat a 10-year-old autistic boy who has injured his back on a trampoline. Emma Snelson and Lizzie Hobday rush to a baby who has stopped breathing

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Compilation episode of the most dramatic car accidents incidents the medics have dealt with, including a man who had to be put into a induced coma after a freak incident

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and Border Protection officers think they have spotted a trend when they seize drugs from behind the dashboards of two cars. A Mexican woman asks officers for protection

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set out to discover if they can go motor racing for less than it costs to play golf. There's also a double helping of guests, with rock star Slash and Formula One driver Kimi Raikkonen taking to the track in Reasonably Priced Cars. Richard also gets behind the wheel of the BMW M5, which is powered by a twin-turbo V8 engine instead of the high-revving V10 of its predecessor

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist and explorer leads a team on a mission to summit a remote and unclimbed mountain in the Stauning Alps of Greenland, crossing a vast river and skiing across a glacier

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef visits a five-star hotel in Madurai, Tamil Nadu, employing local housewives for genuine home-cooked dishes and samples chettinad chicken, a dish inspired by spices brought back from both East and West by merchants. In Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, he meets India's first MasterChef winner, and marks the end of his culinary journey with a small gathering of friends at his bungalow to reveal the outcome of his search for the perfect curry

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May buy second-hand lorries and set about discovering how difficult it is to become an HGV driver. The Porsche 911 and Lamborghini Gallardo are put to the test, and Michael Parkinson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: The team orders four new dog vehicles for the canine section. However, when they're delivered they aren't what was asked for. Meanwhile, Adam worries about pig urine getting on his skin when he fixes a 308 and the mechanics have to handle a bird strike

programme.desc: The team tries to save the police's ailing horse wagons. An officer escapes with his life after a pursuit car is rammed by a stolen 4x4, while the mounted unit keeps the peace at one of the biggest football clashes of the year

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition comes from in and around Newcastle, where first up is 25-year-old barista Delphinium, who's eager to prove that vegetarians can win with her travel-inspired menu. The guests she's hoping to impress this week are 64-year-old financial advisor David, art teacher Karen, development manager Mark and 34-year-old mobile hairdresser Deborah. It's an unusual evening complete with strange food, shocking name reveals and dessert taking an unexpected turn

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night of the competition in and around Newcastle, and art teacher Karen's turn to host. She's looking to impress her guests with a ginger-themed menu. Fussy eater Debs is unexcited at the prospect of goat's cheese or salmon en croute and is more concerned whether Karen has made her own pastry, and while vegetarian Delphinium is underwhelmed by Karen's menu, she really gets stuck into Karen's art class entertainment. Software salesman Mark winds Debs up about 64-year-old ladies' man David, who likes to shock the group with his antics in Ibiza

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Newcastle, mobile hairdresser and amateur musical songstress Debbie plans to bring showbiz razzle dazzle to her night. Humble pie from Mark shocks Karen, and there are very unusual dumplings for barista Delph and Ibiza-loving David to try

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth day in and around Newcastle, Ibiza-loving 64-year-old David plans an elaborate Ibizan-style menu of tapas and paella. However, the menu is all a bit much for Mark, and there's still the issue of Karen's bruised leg and bruised ego to deal with

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final night from in and around Newcastle, and the turn of Essex boy Mark to impress his new Geordie chums with a menu of deep fried brie, slow-cooked lamb and a passion fruit pavlova. Debs, again, struggles with the menu but also lets out her personal feelings about the group. Art teacher Karen gets it in the neck for ruining other people's nights, Mark is accused of being boring, and David settles for bringing a very weird noise to the table

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie asks Doug to ignore her birthday, but he cannot bring himself to let it pass without celebration. Unfortunately, all his last-minute plans go awry

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Kay and Barry are looking to buy a holiday home in the historic city of Jerez in southern Spain, and Jasmine Harman lines up five excellent properties

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The return of the documentary, filmed with South Yorkshire Police just as the Covid-19 pandemic began to take hold in early 2020. In the middle of the night, PCs Dani Devey and Keeley Lees rush to help a traumatised woman, alone at home, as attackers rampage in the street - smashing up houses and cars. They also respond to an elderly, unwell man whose bedsit is under siege from attackers still on the scene

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Greg and Georgie who are taking on the highly ambitious task of converting a dilapidated, 35-year-old barn in Kent. The build will be a huge challenge involving the painstaking conservation of the existing rotten structure, building a new two-storey internal steel frame and recycling everything they can to stretch their £250,000 budget

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets master craftsman Paul, who has muscular dystrophy and is saving a Victorian circus wagon. George also finds out about a grain store being re-imagined as a festival bar, discovers a small hotel disguised as a tree and a camping pod that looks like a giant conker

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Children's food educator Beth Stephens hosts the first dinner party in Lowestoft, Suffolk, where she plans to impress her guests - caravan site owner Ray, beauty therapist Polly, housing officer Jonalt and ASBO officer Rachel - with locally sourced seasonal food. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Caravan park owner Ray hosts the second night in Lowestoft, where he hopes to win the £1,000 prize with a Spanish-themed evening, complete with a homemade tropical zone and an Ibiza-style club night in a barn - despite it being the middle of winter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Albanian-born civil servant Jonalt hosts the fourth party of the competition in Lowestoft, Suffolk, and hopes his family recipes can impress his guests. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final dinner party in Suffolk is hosted by anti-social behaviour officer Rachel, who hopes to win over her guests with an evening of comfort food and a few tricks up her sleeve. programme.desc: A woman is airlifted to hospital after falling off her mobility scooter and getting knocked unconscious. Jamie pushes the boat out with his Malaysian-inspired sea bass cooked in a beautiful fresh banana leaf and served with jasmine rice, rainbow salad and a chilli pickle, and Jimmy serves up some quick quesadillas that will impress even at short notice

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Events planner Natalie hosts the first night from in and around Essex, hoping her homely menu will impress her guests Alison, Amarinder, Donia and Dean

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: The fourth day in Essex sees talent agency owner Donia choosing an Egyptian-themed evening - and after blowing her own trumpet last night, the others are expecting big things

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fish salesman Dean is last to host the group of candidates based in and around Essex. He feels none of the meals served to him have met required standards and firmly believes his restaurant style menu will help bag him the £1,000. However, his choice of main course surprises the others and some of the ingredients in the starter are unexpected too

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Jane and Jilly from Brighton want to buy a holiday home they can escape to at a moment's notice in the picturesque Dordogne region of south-west France. With a budget of £100,000, Laura Hamilton leaves no stone unturned, showing then five properties, but which will have them reaching for their chequebook?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson lines up five great options for childhood sweethearts Laura and Nick, who are after a property in Estepona on Spain's Costa del Sol within their £160,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps house hunters find their dream homes in popular sunny European locations. Potential buyers explore Lucca in Italy

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Martin from Maidenhead, Berkshire, has been visiting Spain ever since he was a teenager. Now that he's retired, he wants to relocate to the countryside near Valencia to enjoy the weather and the laid-back lifestyle. With Martin's brother Arthur coming along to help, Scarlette Douglas finds five options for his £130,000 budget, but are any of them what Martin is looking for?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton lines up five properties on Kefalonia for husband and wife Joe and Fiona, who fell in love with the Greek island during a sailing holiday 15 years ago

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Kay and Barry are looking to buy a holiday home in the historic city of Jerez in southern Spain, and Jasmine Harman lines up five excellent properties

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Control Enthusiast
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the comedian, including topics such as road rage, IBS, her favourite word and how she lets her husband know 'tonight's the night'. There are also stories about 'Rescue Men', passing wind in hospital pants, what can happen at a bra fitting and how she feels about her belly

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The 11 remaining contestants slab-build a 3D building. Plus, Rich Miller tasks the potters to handmake bricks, as he and fellow judge Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be named potter of the week and who will be leaving the pottery. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in the Kentish countryside. Kirstie helps doting father Charlie, who is recently divorced, and his two children find a new family home as they start a new chapter in their lives. Elsewhere, Phil meets Ella and Grant, a couple who are longing for their own space as they want to start a family

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge help Xuxa and Simon, who are keen to transform the Second World War air raid shelter in their garden into a craft room - the only problem is, the space is tiny, so Angel thinks up some creative space-saving solutions. They also get requests to help Lyra and her dad James, who want to make a new chicken coop, and Helena, whose 1960s stereogram record player is no longer spinning

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A six-month-old collie appears to have a developmental deformity where the bones in its elbows don't fit together, but after CT scans, Noel sees that the situation is even more complex. A Burmese mountain dog has a painful bulging disc, which Noel hopes to replace with a bespoke titanium spacer screw, while cat Elmo has a complex fracture to its left back leg after being hit by a car

programme.title: Are Women the Fitter Sex?
programme.desc: Dr Ronx investigates why more men die from Covid-19 than women, a situation that has parallels with many other diseases, including SARS, cancer and HIV. She also looks into a dangerous gender data gap that risks undermining how women are treated within the healthcare system, leading to misdiagnoses and deaths

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: A 21-year-old living on her father's wealth moves in with a single mother who runs cookery classes for people with even less than her, and is moved to tears with the difference in their lifestyles. She also goes on a scary walk round Harlesden

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2015
programme.desc: Action from the opening heat of the competition in Malaysia, where events included the Kettlebell Throw and Atlas Stones. Presented by James Richardson, Charlie Webster and Terry Hollands, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace, who gives his own unique take on proceedings

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2015
programme.desc: Action from the second heat of the competition from Malaysia. Iceland's Hafthor 'Thor' Bjornsson - known to viewers of Game of Thrones as the mighty Mountain - took part alongside Brit Graham Hicks and American Josh Thigpen. Presented by James Richardson, Charlie Webster and Terry Hollands, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2015
programme.desc: Action from the third heat of the competition, which took place in Malaysia. Reigning champion Zydrunas Savickas took part alongside two-time Britain's Strongest Man Laurence Shahlaei, veteran American Nick Best and former Russian marine Mikhail Shivlyakov. Presented by James Richardson, Charlie Webster and Terry Hollands, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Steve and David were once good friends, but are now embroiled in an ongoing dispute that started with a simple off-the-cuff remark and soon spiralled into an all-out war over the ownership of a hedge. Also featured is a man who sent some workmates round to the house of a former mayor to collect money for unpaid building work, but ended up on the wrong side of the law himself when she complained to the police about his behaviour

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of neighbourly conflicts, featuring a dispute between two retired men about a new driveway, which resulted in the pair fighting in the street in the Tayside town of Kinross. The Webbs' peace in rural Plymouth was shattered when a new family moved in a few doors away, and a row about parking erupted into a full-blown punch-up. Meanwhile, Rita Grootendorst claims to have been the victim of a land grab by her next-door neighbours, although she is the one who has been arrested for assault and criminal damage over a drainpipe

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Chloe and Aaron want to know how Nicolette's meeting went with Ricardo, and things seem good when Terese awards Amy the contract, but everything is about to go very wrong

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby starts to realise he might be the reason Bella is leaving. Angelo pushes Taylor to testify against Colby in order to have him arrested, but she refuses

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Landlord Nicholas Parrington discovers a couple are subletting his house, just months after a previous tenant had turned the property into a brothel, while investors in a community centre for children are aghast when squatters move into their building. In Lewisham, the council's Rogue Landlord Unit raids one of their main streets, on the lookout for slum conditions, illegal overcrowding and criminal activities

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: Hansel & Gretel: Witch Hunters (2013)
programme.desc: The fairytale brother and sister grow up to be renowned witch hunters, using advanced weaponry to battle the supernatural. Their latest case leads to an encounter with a powerful sorceress stealing children for an arcane ritual and a discovery about their own past. Fantasy adventure, with Gemma Arterton, Jeremy Renner and Famke Janssen

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The series investigating residential disputes continues, turning attention to feuds that turned violent. Among the stories highlighted are that of former paratrooper Rod who was attacked outside his own home by a knife-wielding neighbour, and 71-year-old Michael, a Suffolk villager whose fellow residents claim he has systematically harassed them, culminating in an assault in which he punched one of his neighbours repeatedly - an incident that was caught on camera. The programme also considers the devastating consequences when personal altercations end up escalating into neighbourhood wars, revealing how a conflict between the Webbs and the Browns in transformed their street in Devon into a war-zone

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A family who have generated more than 600 complaints from angry neighbours move into a quiet suburban street in Blackburn. Plus, a psychiatrist in south London battles a huge renovation next door, while thumping basslines, pounding walls and slamming doors deprive a mother and her family of sleep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of residential feuds, featuring Barnsley pensioners Barry and Phyllis Roddis's dispute with a neighbour who was scrapping cars in his driveway, which led to him waging a nine-year campaign of intimidation against them. Plus, in Streatham, south London, Richard and Philomena Chadwick have been battling for five years to evict squatters whose bongo-playing parties and rooftop sunbathing have invaded the privacy of their once secluded garden

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The De Ropers' hopes of a peaceful life in Yeovil, Somerset, were rudely shattered by their neighbour Peter Stoodley's 120 noisy chickens, and they spent their first two years in their new home battling to persuade the authorities to ban him from keeping animals. In a quiet Anglesey village, 67-year-old Pamela Booth's discovered that her neighbour had been fraudulently using her bank card to steal more than £1,000 over 10 months, while a 24-year-old wannabe rapper in Dagenham, east London, generated more than 80 complaints after repeatedly keeping residents awake by playing loud music into the early hours in his flat

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve discover a locked wooden case when they are called to evict tenants from a flat in London's Docklands. Opening it up, they realise they urgently need police back-up - and the property quickly becomes a crime scene. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner get caught up in a dispute between a landlord and a tenant who refuses to move out, and Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin chase a £17,000 debt. In Essex, a couple owe their neighbour £11,000, and on the south coast, debt collection from a Turkish restaurant gets complicated when there is confusion about ownership

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The story of landlords Pauline and Simon, who bought a property blind with tenants in situ - not realising the difficulties that would ensue. It turned out their tenants were causing havoc in the neighbourhood and had more than a hundred arrests between them for drugs and domestic violence - and if the landlords did not evict them, they themselves could be prosecuted. Plus, a Slough landlord forced to call in an eviction expert when his tenant cut off all communication

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Housing officers in Harrow receive a tip-off about an overcrowded property and when they arrive they find 10 people living in dire conditions and a house that needs extensive emergency work. Squatters in Tottenham invade an elderly woman's home while she is away, ransacking the property and refusing to leave. In Waltham Abbey a seemingly perfect tenant forges her way into a desperate landlord's home, forcing him to move in with his parents while he struggles to evict his unruly occupant

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Two ministers in Liverpool take over an old church with a plan to turn it into a community centre, only to be obstructed by a group of squatters who refuse to leave. Time to call in eviction expert Chris Sharpe. Council officers Shital and Andrew are on the warpath when a neglectful landlord ignores their warnings about fire safety. Northamptonshire landlord Sina visits her property to ask why payments had stopped, only to be faced by an angry and volatile tenant, leaving her scared to return

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The documentary about landlord and tenancy issues catches up on some of the stories featured so far. Emmanuel reveals what happened after he returned from a year working abroad to find himself £24,000 in mortgage arrears and unable to get into his own property. Andy made a mistake when he rented out his north London home to someone he knew, only for his so-called friend to sublet the property, pocket the profits and pay Andy nothing. What has happened since?

programme.title: Murdered By
programme.desc: The story of a 22-year-old woman who escaped war-torn Syria, but her new life in the UK turned into a nightmare when it turned out her abusive husband had a secret family in Afghanistan

programme.title: Levi Bellfield: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: An investigation into the case of doorman and car clamper Levi Bellfield, who committed three murders - including that of schoolgirl Milly Dowler in 2002. But would he have gone on to claim even more victims had he not made a string of mistakes that alerted police? Interviews with detectives, including the officer who interrogated Bellfield, as well as a former partner of the murderer, reveal the errors that led to his arrest

After a nasty tackle on the rugby pitch, 40- year-old Dave is left with a horrific break to his foot and critical care paramedic Pete Edwards must manually realign the bones as quickly as possible, but it's an excruciating procedure

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An angry woman who blames her former daughter-in-law's new husband for her son's death hires a hitman to exact retribution. Briscoe and Curtis manage to get their hands on the contract killer but fail to understand why his customer has gone to such extreme lengths

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Bernard and Lupo investigate when a stockbroker admitted to hospital dies on the operating table from severe internal bleeding. When the case reaches court, McCoy is forced to make one of the most controversial arguments of his career and his path crosses with ADA Cutter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in a local park and the death is initially linked to drugs, but as Bernard and Lupo investigate they discover fingerprints at the scene that lead them to a man with learning difficulties who holds the key to the killing

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An accident at a Navy bombing range brings to light an area used by the Mafia to dump bodies. One of the corpses is identified as a missing FBI agent, so the team investigates the events leading up to his death. Crime drama, guest starring Joe Spano, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team find themselves in deep trouble with the FBI as they try to protect a veteran naval officer who has caught the attention of an al-Qaeda cell. A breakthrough convinces them they have discovered the bomber targeting her, but things are not quite as they seem. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine veteran confesses to the murder of a friend 60 years previously, but Gibbs decides to investigate further rather than take his story at face value, hoping to save the elderly Medal of Honour recipient from a spell in prison. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team arrest an ensign in connection with the death of a Navy commander who had recently undergone surgery, but Abby believes they have got the wrong man. Another fatality soon follows - and it falls to Tony to save his colleagues. Starring Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler tries to rescue a youngster who has been kidnapped by a man with schizophrenia, but resorts to unorthodox tactics that jeopardise his own career. Novak intervenes to ensure his professional survival - and in return asks him to conduct an investigation at a secure psychiatric unit. Crime drama, guest starring Leland Orser

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man is arrested for assaulting his alcoholic wife, who is pregnant - but changes the focus of the case by trying to have her charged with neglect for drinking while expecting a baby. As Benson investigates, he discovers a child had previously been exposed to the harmful consequences of her thoughtless actions

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a poster boy for a pressure group that tries to steer gay people towards heterosexuality. Suspicion falls on a cleric who was conducting a hate-mail campaign against the victim - but it transpires he has a watertight alibi. George Segal guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy witnesses a fatal attack on his stepmother, but is too frightened to tell the police what happened. Sandra Bernhard and Rob Estes guest star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The bomb squad is called out to deal with a suspicious suitcase found on a school bus - but it proves to contain the body of an eight-year-old beauty pageant princess. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of a child's body sends Stabler and Cragen in search of a suspected paedophile, but important medical evidence emerges that implicates someone close to the child. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Crime drama, with Peter Falk and William Shatner

Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ricardo Montalban, A Martinez and Pedro Armendariz Jr

programme.title: Columbo: Requiem for a Falling Star (1973)
programme.desc: A vicious gossip columnist digs the dirt on an ageing film actress, who responds by taking on her most challenging role yet - as a real-life murderer. But when the actress kills her own assistant in error, she looks for a way to shift the blame. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Anne Baxter, Mel Ferrer, Kevin McCarthy and multi-Oscar-winning costume designer Edith Head in a guest appearance as herself

programme.title: Columbo: Double Shock (1973)
programme.desc: A wealthy man due to marry a younger woman is electrocuted in the bath. Columbo suspects the victim's identical twin nephews - a flamboyant TV chef and a conservative banker - who stand to inherit his fortune if he died unmarried, but the detective is unsure which of them is the guilty party. Drama, starring Peter Falk, and Martin Landau in a dual role. With Paul Stewart, Julie Newmar and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: Columbo Cries Wolf (1990)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth suspects the owner of a men's magazine is behind the strange disappearance of his business partner and former lover. The suspect insists the woman is still alive, while the detective struggles to prove his guilt owing to the absence of a body. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ian Buchanan, Rebecca Staab, Deidre Hall and Alan Scarfe

programme.title: Columbo: Uneasy Lies the Crown (1990)
programme.desc: A dentist with gambling debts discovers his wife is having an affair with one of his patients and wants a divorce. He plans to take revenge by poisoning the lover with his wife's heart medication, so she will be suspected - but he reckons without the attentions of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, James Read, Paul Burke, Jo Anderson and Nancy Walker

programme.title: Columbo: Butterfly in Shades of Grey (1993)
programme.desc: A radio presenter is plotting to sabotage his adopted daughter's plans to publish her first novel and kills one of his employees for trying to help her. He thinks he has the perfect alibi, claiming that the victim was murdered while they were talking to each other on the phone, and there is a tape recording to prove it - but his ruse fails to fool the dishevelled detective. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, William Shatner and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

programme.desc: A fugitive sex offender kidnaps his accuser, leading Detectives Benson and Stabler to question the man's dying mother to discover where he is heading. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Drama, guest starring Serena Williams, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw are halfway through their road trip as they travel deep in the Scottish Borders to seek out bargains they hope will make a profit. Catherine uncovers a pair of vintage glove puppets, which will be sold alongside the experts' other items at the Edinburgh auction

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw embark on the penultimate leg of their challenge, starting out in Callander, shopping across central Scotland and heading for auction in Kinbuck

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw embark on the last leg of their road trip, planning on shopping in Perthshire and Angus. As things stand it is two auctions each, so both need to win the final decisive battle in Aberdeen

programme.title: The Weekend Workshop
programme.desc: Kate builds stylish garden furniture from scaffolding boards and a bucket. Plus, Max takes on an emotional project for a woman

programme.title: Helicopter ER

programme.title: My Violent Child
programme.desc: Documentary following therapist Mandy Saligari as she takes on some of the UK's most violent and difficult children, and tries to figure out what makes their behaviour so extreme. In the first edition, she heads to South Wales, where she deals with one of the most troubling cases she has ever seen. Jack is just months away from turning ten, the criminal age of responsibility, and is at risk of being locked up due to how badly he terrorises his dad. In addition to this, he has been expelled from school for attacking a pupil, so Mandy uses unconventional methods in an attempt to solve his behavioural issues

programme.title: Embarrassing Fat Bodies
programme.desc: Doctors Christian Jessen, Dawn Harper and Pixie McKenna offer medical advice to a husband and wife who have a combined weight of 52 stone, and a 21-year-old mother whose enjoyment of life is restricted by her J-cup breasts

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Part two of two. Morgana and Helios have captured Camelot, leaving Arthur and Merlin on the run - and faced with the betrayal of a trusted courtier and the strength of the enemy, the king has lost the will to fight. It seems only the young servant can restore his master's faith - but only an extraordinary act can prove he was born to rule. Sword-and-sorcery adventure, starring Colin Morgan, Bradley James and Katie McGrath, with guest appearances by Ben Daniels, Miranda Raison and Terence Maynard

programme.title: Merlin

programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
